title: Win's Create Vanilla+
description: A Create modpack focused on coherence and simplicity
body:
This modpack aims to seamlessly patch up the weaknesses of Vanilla Minecraft,  
like performance, graphics, animations, world generation and incomplete/missing features.  
Enjoy Create like never before while playing Minecraft as it always should have been!

This modpack also lets users take full advantage of their high-end PCs,  
while still being compatible with low- to mid-end machines.

**Features:**
- Create
- Overhauled world generation
- Overhauled End
- Vast performance improvements
- Countless Quality of Life improvements, configured to be unobtrusive
- Full OptiFine Resourcepack compatibility

**Notable Changes:**
- Creepers don't destroy blocks, but MobGriefing is otherwise enabled
- You keep all items on death, but drop all XP. The XP can be recovered in full.
